summary: Comprehensive testing of VS Fashion e-commerce platform completed. Backend APIs 96% functional, frontend UI working well. Key flows tested include homepage hero carousel, product browsing, admin authentication, and product detail pages. Database contains seeded data with 3 customers, 4 collections, 1 product, and 2 orders.

minor_bugs.issue: Product creation API expects form-data format but test was sending JSON
minor_bugs.impact: Admin product creation may need form-data encoding

ui_bugs.issue: Size selection radio buttons have overlay interception preventing clicks
Form field selectors not matching expected data-testid patterns

integration_issues.issue: Admin login session appears to expire quickly, causing redirects to customer login instead of admin login

passed_tests: Product detail page with image gallery

priority_fixes: Fix product creation API to handle form-data properly for admin product management
Resolve size selection overlay interception issue on product detail pages
Improve admin session management to prevent unexpected redirects to customer login
Add proper data-testid attributes to registration form fields for better testability
recommendations: Database is well-seeded with sample data - good foundation
Hero carousel and product browsing work excellently
Consider adding more robust error handling for form interactions
